mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.user_id, u.name AS user_name, t.type, t.category, t.workflow, t.priority, t.planned_end, t.progress, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_watcher w WHERE w.task_id = t.id AND w.user_id = #{userId}) AS isWatch FROM task t JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT p.user_id AS id, u.name FROM project_member p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT com_value AS id, com_name AS name FROM common_code WHERE group_value = '0S'
SELECT com_value AS id, com_name AS name FROM common_code WHERE group_value = '0Q'
SELECT id FROM (SELECT * FROM files ORDER BY created_on DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('task') FROM dual
INSERT INTO task(id, project_id, version_id, title, description, user_id, type, category, workflow, priority, planned_start, planned_end, actual_start, actual_end, estimated_time, progress, status, parent_id, is_public, creator, file_id) VALUES(#{id}, #{projectId}, #{version}, #{title}, #{description}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{category}, #{workflow}, #{priority}, #{plannedStart}, #{plannedEnd}, #{actualStart}, #{actualEnd}, #{estimatedTime}, #{progress}, 'T1', #{parentId}, #{isPublic}, #{creator}, #{fileId})
